---
title: "Das Erfurter Programm / The Erfurt Programme"
---

Karl Kautsky, *Das Erfurter Programm in seinem grundsätzlichen Theil erläutert*
(1892) — a complete, unabridged parallel German/English edition.

The German text follows the Marxists Internet Archive transcription of the
Dietz Verlag (Berlin) 1965 edition. The English translation is new: the
standard 1910 translation by William E. Bohn (*The Class Struggle*) abridged
the text to roughly two-thirds of its length and rendered core theoretical
terminology inconsistently.

See the [editorial note](editorial.qmd) for translation principles and
methodology, or begin with the [Preface to the First Edition](chapters/vorwort-92.qmd).
